  "schoolId": "SCHOOL_ID_HERE",
  "title": "Updated: Welcome to New Academic Year",
  "content": "Classes begin next Tuesday at 9 AM instead of Monday.",
  "target": "student",
  "date": "2026-07-02",
  "sender": "Principal Office"
}

request.description: Scenario A — via inquiry. Only inquiryId is sent; studentName/dob/gender/guardians are auto-copied from the linked inquiry, and that inquiry is advanced to ADMITTED. (Any of those fields you DO send here override the copy.)
Scenario B — direct / walk-in. No inquiryId; the applicant data (studentName, dob, gender, guardians) is entered directly. No inquiry is linked or advanced.
